label: 区域嵌套（河岸侵蚀）
description: 区域嵌套的河岸式变体：用低频噪声场驱动每段边界的侵蚀深度——深处大幅退入（宽）、浅处几乎贴边（窄），让内边界形成深浅不一、忽宽忽窄的自然河岸波动，而非与外轮廓平行的等距内缩。
description-en: Riverbank variant of zone nesting: a low-frequency noise field drives the erosion depth per boundary segment — deep where the noise is high (wide cut-in), shallow where it is low (narrow) — so the inner boundary fluctuates like a natural riverbank instead of paralleling the outer contour as a uniform offset.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。俯视一块地块，外缘平直、内缘呈忽深忽浅的波浪状河岸线，深色水/背景咬入浅色地块形成不规则海湾，主色2种。

inputs.name: inputGrid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 单张二维网格（grid[y][x]）；目标区域被变深度河岸式侵蚀后再样条平滑。网格列表由引擎按 DataTree 自动逐张 fanout。
inputs.description-en: A single 2D grid (grid[y][x]); its target region is eroded with variable riverbank depth then spline-smoothed. The engine fans out a DataTree of grids one-by-one.

inputs.name: targetValue
inputs.label: 目标区域值
inputs.description-en: Mask value of the target region.

inputs.name: erosionStrength
inputs.label: 平均侵蚀强度
inputs.description: 内边界的平均侵蚀深度比例：大于 1 时按 0~100 百分点（默认 54）；≤1 时按 0~1 归一化。深度在此均值上下按 waviness 波动。
inputs.description-en: Mean erosion-depth fraction of the inner boundary. If >1, percent 0–100 (default 54); if ≤1, normalized 0–1. Depth fluctuates around this mean by 'waviness'.

inputs.name: maxDepth
inputs.label: 最大侵蚀深度
inputs.description: 侵蚀深度上限（格数）。深度场 = clamp(强度 ± 波动, 0~1) × 本值，决定河岸最深能咬入多少格。
inputs.description-en: Maximum erosion depth in cells. Depth field = clamp(strength ± waviness, 0..1) × this value, capping how far the riverbank can cut in.

inputs.name: waviness
inputs.label: 波动幅度
inputs.description: 内边界深浅起伏的幅度：0=接近均匀偏移，越大越忽宽忽窄。推荐 0.5~1.2。
inputs.description-en: Amplitude of the depth fluctuation: 0 ≈ uniform offset, larger = more uneven (wide/narrow). Recommended 0.5–1.2.

inputs.name: featureScale
inputs.label: 波动频率
inputs.description: 噪声场空间频率，越小波浪越长（大尺度海湾），越大越细碎。推荐 0.03~0.12。
inputs.description-en: Spatial frequency of the noise field; smaller = longer waves (large bays), larger = finer. Recommended 0.03–0.12.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 侵蚀深度场随机种子，0 使用当前时间戳
inputs.description-en: Seed for the erosion depth field; 0 uses timestamp.

inputs.name: splineAlgorithm
inputs.label: 样条算法
inputs.description: bezier=贝塞尔(Chaikin)；cubic_spline=三次样条；moving_avg=移动平均；gaussian=高斯；polyline_perturb=折线扰动
inputs.description-en: Closed-loop spline algorithm (same family as edge_spline).

inputs.name: splineSmoothness
inputs.label: 样条平滑强度
inputs.description: 1~20，与边缘样条化电池含义一致
inputs.description-en: Spline intensity (1–20), same as edge_spline smoothness.

inputs.name: splineSeed
inputs.label: 样条随机种子
inputs.description: 仅 polyline_perturb 使用；0 表示每次随机

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 输出网格
outputs.description: 河岸式变深度侵蚀并样条平滑后的单张网格；输入为网格列表时引擎逐张产出对应的 DataTree。
outputs.description-en: A single grid after riverbank variable-depth erosion and spline; with a grid-list input the engine emits one per branch as a DataTree.
